page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides a toolset for visualizing longitudinal microbiome data with a horizon plot. A horizon plot provides a compact method to display change in the distribution of microbial taxa over time.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package provides a toolset for visualizing longitudinal microbiome data with a horizon plot. A horizon plot provides a compact method to display change in the distribution of microbial taxa over time.
